morning_brief.preview:
---
# EverPass Morning Brief — Saturday, May 23, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. **ACCUWEATHER** — RYAN EMAIL TO McCORMACK STILL BLOCKING DOCUSIGN (5TH DAY UNRESOLVED)
   All six open items closed in the May 19 draft. Ryan's confirmation email to Patrick McCormack (Patrick.McCormack@accuweather.com) on three pre-execution items (incl. Exhibit D) is the sole blocker before AccuWeather issues DocuSign to AKaplan@everpass.com. Now into Memorial Day weekend — every day of delay risks slipping to Tuesday May 26.
   **Deadline: OVERDUE — send today. This is the only action required to move to execution.**

2. **CHARTER** — EXHIBITS A (+38d) / B (+22d) OVERDUE; MAY 26 MEETING IN 3 DAYS
   EP counter (Amendment v2, 2026-05-21) staged: EP_Charter_Amendment__2026-05-21_v2.docx + redline PDF. Five structural walk-away clauses must be reinserted; DIRECTV auto-parity rejected. Send counter to Taylor Holden (Taylor.Holden@spectrum.com) + Wade Lange today. May 26 meeting logistics must be confirmed before Monday.
   **Deadline: TODAY — send counter; confirm May 26 meeting logistics before EOD.**

3. **DIRECTV** — PRE-LITIGATION; 45+ DAYS SILENCE; DEMAND LETTER SEND DATE UNCONFIRMED
   No response since ~Apr 6. Net underpayment claim $2,634,239.50 (gross $3,544,623); $65M second payment outstanding. Kelley Drye demand letter send date not locked as of yesterday EOD. Documented false/defamatory dealer network statements add weight to claim.
   **Deadline: OVERDUE — confirm Kelley Drye demand letter target send date before Memorial Day weekend ends. Do not re-enter the week without it locked.**

4. **CHSN** — SECTION 5(e) LAPSED ~55 DAYS (LONGEST-RUNNING UNRESOLVED CONTRACT RISK)
   Section 5(e) lapsed approximately March 29, 2026. No confirmed cure path on record. No update logged from yesterday's brief.
   **Deadline: IMMEDIATE — confirm cure path or escalate to counsel today. Holiday weekend makes further drift unacceptable.**

5. **TWDC/ESPN (McIntosh)** — TRACK A+B 20+ DAYS OVERDUE; RESPONSE INBOUND NEXT WEEK
   Operator decision 2026-05-22: Disney status shifted from silent (36+ days) to "response inbound next week." No action required this weekend — monitor for inbound Monday/Tuesday.
   **Deadline: No action today. Flag for follow-up Monday May 26 if no contact.**

6. **NBCU** — ENO WINDOW 56 DAYS; MAY 18 APPLEMAN OUTCOME STILL UNLOGGED
   ENO deadline Jul 15, 2026 (~53 days). May 18 Appleman call outcome unlogged; yesterday's 1pm Appleman call outcome also unlogged. Cockpit remains stale on this track. Principal Geary-Kaplan track dark 7+ months.
   **Deadline: Log both call outcomes in cockpit before EOD today. Confirm Geary-Kaplan escalation path before Tuesday.**

7. **NESN** — TERM SHEET DEADLINE PASSED +10 DAYS; PLAEHN WINDOW COOLING
   Clean term sheet v7 deadline passed May 13. MG structure ($300K combined Yrs 1–2 / $350K/yr from Yr 3) and Gate 3 clearance unresolved. Plaehn "give a ring" signal warm but cooling over the long weekend.
   **Deadline: PASSED (+10d) — contact Plaehn today or this slips to Tuesday May 26.**

8. **MARQUEE** — CEO SIGNED; COUNTER-SIGNATURE OUTSTANDING; GO/NO-GO NOT COMMUNICATED TO LEE
   Alex Kaplan executed EverPass copy. Marquee counter-signature outstanding pending Ryan's go/no-go communication to Lee. No update from yesterday.
   **Deadline: Communicate go/no-go to Lee before EOD today or this drifts through the holiday.**

---

## Active Deal Status

EverPass Is Not Exclusive for Small Venues; Effective Exclusivity Exists at Scale — DIRECTV FOR BUSINESS simultaneously distributes Apple TV F1, MLS, and MLB Friday Night Baseball to 300,000+ commercial venues; however, DIRECTV streaming has a 20-TV cap, mean…

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Day-1 Dish Partnership Exploration Held — Charter-Parallel Model Receptive — First substantive packaging conversation between EP and Dish Business. Attendees: Andy, Kate (Dish); Ryan Blood, Alex Kaplan (EP). Sling Orange commercialization path closed by Dish…

Rate card is flagged as still under review — Schedule 1 carries a note that per-subscriber fees are "subject to Schedule 1 Section under the term sheet [Rate Card Under Review/Parties to Discuss]" and final rates are to be confirmed at execution; the current…

No Deal in Place; FOX Is the Only Major Broadcast Sports Provider Without an EverPass Agreement — FOX verbally committed EverPass as preferred commercial launch partner for Fox One DTC in July 2025; discussions stalled in November 2025 with no formal response…

Economics Gap: Zero-Fee vs. Paid-Per-Sub — EverPass proposes zero license fee with ad pass-through as consideration; Scripps Term Sheet requires paid per-sub fees at a rate card not yet provided. Neither side has moved and no counterpart economic draft exists.

bridge_signals.title: [?] Automatic reply: Content Pipeline
bridge_signals.summary: I am out of the office May 21& 22. I'll get back with you upon my return!

bridge_signals.title: [AccuWeather] Re: EverPass + AccuWeather Agreement
bridge_signals.summary: Hi Ryan, My legal team told me that the Docusign was sent to Alex, but I was not on the email personally. I asked the Legal team to double check. I will keep you posted. Looking forward to getting this signed and on to launching. Thanks! -P

bridge_signals.title: [DIRECTV (outside counsel - Kelley Drye)] Michael Lynch sent you "Draft Follow Up Letter to DIRECTV re Audit v4"
bridge_signals.summary: Hi all: Attached please find a draft letter along the lines we discussed.  Please send us comments when you have chance or we can just discuss on Tuesday. Thanks. MICHAEL C. LYNCH Chair, Litigation Practice Group Kelley Drye & Warren LLP

bridge_signals.title: [YouTube TV] Out of Office: Delayed Response Re: Fw: YouTube/ Everpass - Packaging
bridge_signals.summary: Hello, I am currently overseas on business travel so my responses will be delayed. For emergencies, please text me. Thank you for your patience. Tony

bridge_signals.title: [?] Ryan, have you adopted your new furry friend?
bridge_signals.summary: Let us know so we can send you tips on how to bond using TEMPTATIONS treats.

bridge_signals.title: [?] Re: YouTube/ Everpass - Packaging
bridge_signals.summary: Thanks again for the time last week. Following up on our last conversation - linked below (pword everpass) and also attached as a pdf is the go-to-market overview for the EverPass YouTube TV commercial venue channel. It maps out the full pi

bridge_signals.title: [AccuWeather] StreamTv
bridge_signals.summary: Hi Ryan, Glad we are close to the finish line on our agreement.  I see you plan to be at StreamTV in Denver next month.  I will be there and would love to find time to meet in person.  Please let me know if you have some avails. Thank you.

bridge_signals.title: [Apple] Event canceled: Apple x Everpass Meetup
bridge_signals.summary: Event canceled: Apple x Everpass Meetup Organizer: Shaina Lemmerman Date: Thursday, May 21, 2026 Time: 09:00 PM (EDT) to 10:30 PM (EDT) (1 hour, 30 minutes)

bridge_signals.title: [?] Re: NBA Term Sheet - Privileged and Confidential
bridge_signals.summary: Yep, co-lo fees are already contemplated in NBA LP costs. On another note, I noticed in the agreement that we (EverPass) own 42% of ad inventory for each game (and the ads need to be programmatic). I don't think we've done programmatic adve
